case_title: VU T.Q. WILLIAMS VS. CLIFF PEROTTI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, VU T.Q. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEROTTI, CLIFF DBA  LION  AND FOSTER INTERNATIONAL, INC. $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.36 INTEREST, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,603.36, "DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $166.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
